textByHash.00668bb0c166d2a2818a82117ead371c82dcf1e9: Zyanyi Arkan. What an unexpected surprise. Your business here must be very important for you to have not sent prior word of your coming.
textByHash.2900af0b1994474fdb5f4c736223e2227975f6a5: Well, what kind of ruler would I be if I didn't make sure to treat our honoured allies with the highest of respect?
textByHash.dacd0968c21cfab95d3c9f34183087b251cbbe2b: I heard about the unfortunate events at the Teomat, but it is good to see the Teokan has made a full recovery. No doubt those responsible met swift justice?
textByHash.d11576c69922dee3b32fe45cf06d9f24d1d9cb4b: So they are still at large? How concerning. Still, I'm sure your son and his knights will be doing all they can to rectify that.
textByHash.71d94855561df8ebe314f50c0cd4f3cf7b878552: Yes, of course. What is it that brings you here?
textByHash.f538c30d23ed759dc74efd479841b0a001acab11: Enemies of Varlamore in Cam Torum? I couldn't even begin to imagine such a thing! Are you sure of this?
textByHash.633ddaf04f342151294bb19ba202be9a5781d7c3: Then what can you tell me of these enemies?
textByHash.976050842cb057c523f0f20c612e9b73a1e1be72: I assure you, no cultist would have been granted access to the city. For a start, there are only four of us who even have the ability to grant that access.
textByHash.6f9ba9d6534cef1a1743c9b8b3bdf3c2f2a80775: However, it is clear this is a matter of great importance to you. I will ensure that we keep a close eye out for any cultists.
textByHash.a606bde3937003c3307d1ee4ebeecbf47eb05fcf: I understand, and I would very much like to help you. However, a human investigation in Cam Torum would not be looked upon kindly by the citizens here.
textByHash.502d53821588f1b4564bde7f2a97dec3c565ac60: You are happy to vouch for them, Attala?
textByHash.d1aad86fbdd2ba43ca489c85a9936e261c6c7343: Very well. In that case, my good friends, I grant you permission to search for these cultists. Attala here will join you. Do let her know if there's anything at all that you need.
textByHash.bb8d2da12afabb557f7280124d8997717ab3ab82: Do not mention it. Dealing with Varlamorians is always such a pleasure. Now, I'm afraid I must depart, but I wish you good luck.
textByHash.2bc2e462e6627edf04826d409e037bb63d35a7f7: Ah, good day to you, human. It's always a pleasure to have the company of your kind in our city.
textByHash.97a8381f954631beae1c2a38070644b36819586a: I'd love to stop and chat with you, but I'm afraid I'm very busy. I have no doubt that you also have plenty of things you need to be doing yourself. Don't let me keep you from them.
